title: APIKey
description: The details of an API key, without the secret.

id.description: The unique ID of the API key.

name.description: The name of the API key.

project_id.description: The ID of the project containing the API key.

roles.description: The roles assigned to the API key.

items.description:
A role that can be assigned to an API key.
Possible values: `ProjectEditor`, `ProjectViewer`, `ControlPlaneEditor`, `ControlPlaneViewer`, `DataPlaneEditor`, or `DataPlaneViewer`.
